closed_reason: Operator killed the t112h escalation and closed the canary mission. Both technical blockers resolved + verified (deploy 4270e21, /chat + /agent HTTP 200); smoke gate green (3b197ce); hourly polling cron retired (moved to crew-owned zero-token poller). Continued ungrounded YELLOW cycles on a Section 31 ALPHA projection add no value.

Basis: both prior blockers (worfgate-crewId /chat, agent handshake) RESOLVED + verified (deploy 4270e21, HTTP 200), smoke gate green (3b197ce), and the YELLOW rulings were ungrounded ALPHA projections with no live CloudWatch. 100% production promotion remains available as a separate human-gated action if/when desired.

BUT orchestrator flags: the two blockers driving prior YELLOWs are RESOLVED + verified (deploy 4270e21, /chat + /agent HTTP 200). Crew YELLOW rationale (auth-layer vulns, service-mesh/edge latency, pen-test) is UNGROUNDED — Section 31 ALPHA projection, no live CloudWatch, officers confabulating metrics.
